title: T.MOD
description: Vanilla+ modpack with quality of life improvements
body:
Quality of Life Modpack

This modpack is designed to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience without changing the core gameplay. It focuses on quality of life improvements that make the game smoother, more convenient, and more enjoyable to play.

Features include performance optimizations, better inventory management, useful UI enhancements, improved visuals, and small tweaks that reduce unnecessary frustration. Everything is carefully balanced to stay true to the original feel of Minecraft while removing common annoyances.

Perfect for players who want a more polished and comfortable Minecraft experience—whether you’re building, exploring, or playing long survival worlds.

Have Fun!




**Credits:**
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
